items.name: SecBench-Solver
items.description: SecBench-Solver is a multi-agent adversarial pipeline for automated C/C++ memory safety vulnerability fixing. It takes SEC-bench instances (sanitizer reports + Docker envs) as input, outputs verified patches via PoC differential analysis, property-based targeted repairs, closed-loop validation, and a dual experience knowledge base.
